title: Outlander
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses}}
"'''Outlander'''," known as '''Ootman''' in [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]], was a term used to describe an individual not from a specific [[Planet/Legends|planet]], or anyone considered to be an outsider to a certain culture or way of life.

==History==
[[Alliance Commander|The leader]] of the [[Eternal Alliance|Alliance]] that opposed the [[Eternal Empire]] was known as "The Outlander", as a result of [[Arcann|Prince Arcann's]] proclamation following the death of [[Tenebrae|Emperor Valkorion]] in [[3636 BBY]].

[[Watto/Legends|Watto]] used the term to describe [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] when the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] visited [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].<ref name="TPM">{{Film|I}}</ref>

The [[Force void/Legends|Force Blank]] [[Granta Omega]] was called an "outlander" by the [[Haariden]] troops that he paid to attack the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] on their homeworld in his quest to take over the marketing of [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] through a [[titanite]] mining venture in [[26 BBY/Legends|26 BBY]]. The troops could not recall Omega's appearance, were unable to remember at all what he looked like.<ref name="Jedi Quest: The Master of Disguise">''[[Jedi Quest: The Master of Disguise]]''</ref>

[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Calvaria]] of [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor's]] [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]]-[[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Nallastia]] called the [[Hondu Firewell|parents]] of [[Klay Firewell]] "outlanders" when she accused them of trespassing and harboring an untoward (poaching) interest in the "sacred creatures of Nallastia" in [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]].<ref name="Star Wars Adventures 2: The Cavern of Screaming Skulls">''[[Star Wars Adventures 2: The Cavern of Screaming Skulls]]''</ref>

The small [[Gwurran]] nomad [[Tooqui]]—an [[Ansionian]] pygmy who stole provisions from the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] on [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]—called [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]] "small-head outland big-lips" and the Jedi party that accompanied her "nasty ugly outlander strangers."<ref name="The Approaching Storm">''[[The Approaching Storm]]''</ref>

That same [[22 BBY/Legends|year]], [[Voyla]] called [[Passel Argente/Legends|Passel Argente]] an outlander when he came to [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]]. And [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] was called the "Demon Outlander" by the [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]] after he [[Mission to rescue Shmi Skywalker Lars/Legends|slaughtered]] a camp of Tusken Raiders for murdering his mother.
